creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

This PR can be closed once the pending patches for  
lang/gcc45 and print/pdftk are committed.  gcc42 will no 
longer be required for compiling pdftk.  See this message 
sent to freebsd-ports@: 

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2010-April/060475.html
